\tzpentry{ID4740}{Angular Velocity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4740 introduces Angular Velocity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\lim_{\\tau \\to \\tau_c} \\left| \\frac{\\partial^n \\Omega}{\\partial \\tau^n} \\right| = \\infty, \\quad \\forall n \\in \\mathbb{N}\n\\end{equation}
